title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Martin Omander demonstrates five planning tactics for deploying Antigravity 2.0 agents on complex enterprise codebases: linking multiple repositories, establishing coding standards hierarchies, setting OS-level sandboxing and command allowlists, using voice input for context, and using interrogation commands to clarify requirements before execution.
